name: Verdict summary

en.when_to_use: Use it after comparing several options when you need to compress "who wins, why, who it is best for, and what it costs" into one decision: ideal for review conclusions, purchasing advice, and solution recommendations. If you do not yet have itemized evidence, first use comparison-table or head-to-head; to show change in one metric, use metric-delta.
en.why_valuable: AI recommendation paragraphs often bury the conclusion, reasoning, audience, and caveats in long prose; this component turns them into a clear winner banner, reason cards, persona labels, and runner-up/tradeoff area so readers can restate the decision within seconds.

data_in.note: data is a read-only decision summary: winner.name is the primary conclusion and rationale is the core explanation; reasons provides scannable evidence, bestFor pairs each persona with a fit reason, and runnerUp and caveat are optional. Arrays render in input order, and all text is treated as plain text.

schema.title?: string -- decision question being answered; displays "Decision verdict" when omitted
schema.winner: {name:string,badge?:string,icon?:string} -- winning option; badge is a short positioning phrase, icon is one short character or emoji and defaults to ★
schema.rationale: string -- one to three sentences with the core recommendation rationale
schema.bestFor?: {persona:string,reason?:string}[] -- "best for" labels; reason is a short fit explanation
schema.runnerUp?: {name:string,reason?:string} -- runner-up and the conditions where it fits better
schema.caveat?: string -- key tradeoff or caveat for the winner

spec.note: Grows with the number of reasons, personas, and notes; the two-column area becomes one column below 600px. No required internal scrolling or carrier measurement.

when_to_use: 已经比较完多个方案，需要把“谁赢、为什么、最适合谁、代价是什么”压缩成一个决策结论时用它：适合评测收尾、采购建议和方案推荐。还没有逐项证据时先用 comparison-table 或 head-to-head；需要展示单一指标变化时改用 metric-delta。
why_valuable: AI 的推荐段落常把结论、理由、目标人群和保留意见埋在长文里；本组件把它们变成清晰的赢家横幅、理由卡、persona 标签和 runner-up/取舍区，读者几秒内就能复述决策。

data_in.note: data 是一份只读决策摘要：winner.name 是主结论，rationale 是核心解释；reasons 给出可扫读依据，bestFor 把 persona 与适配原因成对展示；runnerUp 与 caveat 均可选。数组按输入顺序渲染，所有文本都按纯文本处理。

schema.title?: string —— 正在回答的决策问题；省略时显示 “Decision verdict”
schema.winner: {name:string,badge?:string,icon?:string} —— 获胜方案；badge 是定位短句，icon 是一个短字符或 emoji，省略为 ★
schema.rationale: string —— 一至三句核心推荐理由
schema.reasons?: string[] —— 2–4 条可扫读的胜出依据
schema.bestFor?: {persona:string,reason?:string}[] —— “最适合谁”标签；reason 是简短适配说明
schema.runnerUp?: {name:string,reason?:string} —— 次选方案与更适合它的条件
schema.caveat?: string —— 赢家的关键取舍或保留意见

spec.note: 按理由、persona 和备注数量自动增高；两列区在 600px 以下折为单列。无内部必需滚动和载体测量。

example._why: 用项目管理工具选型收尾，展示一个明确赢家、四条理由、三类 persona、次选项和真实取舍，信息层级完整。

minimal.title: Which project hub should a 12-person product team choose?

winner.name: Linear
winner.badge: Fastest path from issue to shipped work

minimal.rationale: Linear wins for a product-led team that values speed, clean defaults, and low-maintenance workflows. It keeps planning structured without turning the tool itself into a project.
reasons: Cycles and roadmaps work together out of the box

runnerUp.name: Notion
runnerUp.reason: Choose it when docs and flexible databases matter more than issue velocity.

minimal.caveat: Linear is less flexible for wiki-heavy teams and highly bespoke business workflows.

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
